# Psi

**Summary**: A wavefield extrapolation technique used for prestack depth migration.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-mohammed|Mohammed, 2015]] used PSPI to perform prestack depth imaging and modified it with a Q-factor to account for visco-acoustic effects.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The modified PSPI algorithm successfully compensated for absorption in the Marmousi dataset, providing better resolution than standard PSPI. ([[2015-mohammed|Mohammed, 2015, p. 100]])
